title: Grant Sanderson (@3blue1brown) – AI and the future of math
summary: Grant Sanderson discusses how AI has made faster progress in mathematics than other fields, revealing what AI capabilities and limitations look like. He explores whether AI increases or decreases human mathematical understanding, the nature of conceptual breakthroughs versus AI proof-discovery, and advice for students in fields being transformed by AI.
writeup: Grant Sanderson, creator of 3Blue1Brown, talks with Dwarkesh Patel about why AI has advanced faster in mathematics than in other fields, and what that pace reveals about current capabilities and limits. The conversation distinguishes AI proof-discovery from conceptual breakthroughs, and asks whether AI tools raise or lower human mathematical understanding. It closes with advice for students entering fields being reshaped by AI.
